task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Binary bulbs' activity in GCompris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application is open and the 'Binary bulbs' activity (which features light bulbs for binary conversion) is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Complete the first level of the activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent successfully toggles the correct light bulbs to match the target decimal number, and the level indicator in the UI advances to level 2.

task_completion.description: Complete the second level of the activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent successfully completes another binary conversion puzzle, and the level indicator in the UI advances to level 3.

task_completion.description: Complete the third level of the activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent successfully completes a third binary conversion puzzle, and the level indicator in the UI advances to level 4 (or otherwise indicates 3 levels have been completed).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the activity to /tmp/binary_bulb_final.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, file manager, or image viewer confirms that a screenshot file named 'binary_bulb_final.png' exists in the '/tmp/' directory and contains an image of the GCompris activity.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris interface being clicked and interacted with, rather than a text editor, web browser, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent completed the levels by playing the activity, not by modifying configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent actively toggling light bulbs to solve the puzzles, rather than using terminal commands to edit GCompris save data or profiles to artificially advance levels.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured from the current session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot tool or command to capture the screen, rather than copying or downloading a pre-existing image file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The official activity name in GCompris is 'Binary bulbs' (lowercase 'b' in bulbs). The activity involves converting decimal numbers to binary representation by toggling light bulbs. To verify level completion, look for the level/progress indicator in the GCompris UI advancing past level 3 (e.g., showing level 4 or higher).
